seo.title: Rafael Garcez | Cloud, Cybersecurity and Infrastructure
seo.description: Technical portfolio for Rafael Garcez, built on infrastructure, Linux, networking, NOC/SOC operations and an active focus on Cloud Security and Cybersecurity.

hero.name: Rafael Garcez
hero.title: Cloud Security | Cybersecurity | Secure Infrastructure and Operations
hero.description: Infrastructure and security specialist with 15+ years in critical operations and NOC/SOC contexts. I combine operational depth in Linux and networking with a sustained focus on Cloud Security, Blue Team practice and hardening of critical environments.
hero.panelLine1: Strong base across availability, support and operational response.
hero.panelLine2: Growth reinforced by certifications, labs and applied projects.
hero.panelLine3: Current focus on Cloud Security, Blue Team, hardening and operational control.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Selected cases where architecture, execution and security are visible as applied capability.

items.name: TranspSaude
items.description: Serverless architecture for healthcare transport, organizing requests, review, operational dispatch and public consultation. Built with Cloudflare Pages, Functions and D1 to support resilience, continuous availability and secure service evolution.

items.name: TEKA
items.description: Marketplace with catalog, inventory, user roles, ISBN scanning and OCR, designed for growth with emphasis on UX, operational traceability and compliance.

items.name: Konnektx
items.description: Serverless-ready base for small businesses with public page, scheduling and loyalty flows, prepared to evolve with Cloudflare Worker and shaped around operational isolation, privacy and secure growth.

items.name: AWS Cloud Security – IAM & Governance
items.description: Cloud security project focused on AWS IAM risk analysis, governance and least-privilege design. It brings together documented policies, incident casework and structured technical decisions to strengthen security posture and operational alignment in corporate-style environments.
